# Support

Need help with Atlas? Here's where to go.

- **Questions & ideas** — open a [Discussion](https://github.com/hlibsuslov/atlas-travel-editor/discussions).
- **Bugs** — open an [issue](https://github.com/hlibsuslov/atlas-travel-editor/issues/new/choose) with the bug template.
- **Feature requests** — open an issue with the feature template.
- **Docs** — start with the [README](../README.md) and
  [documentation index](../docs/README.md); deployment and self-hosting each have
  maintained runbooks there.

Please search existing issues and discussions first to avoid duplicates.
